# QRCodeGenerator.to

> Free online QR code generator. Create QR codes for URLs, plain text, WiFi networks, vCard contacts, email, and SMS in seconds. Customize colors, adjust scale, download as PNG or SVG. Static QR codes that never expire. Free, fast, and easy.

## What it is

QRCodeGenerator.to is a QR code generator that creates static QR codes for any use case — links, WiFi sharing, contact cards, email drafts, SMS messages, and plain text. Pick a data type, fill in the fields, customize colors and scale, download as PNG or SVG. Static QR codes encode data directly into the pattern, so they never expire and work without any server or subscription.

## Who uses it

- Small business owners adding QR codes to business cards, posters, flyers, and product packaging
- Restaurants and cafes creating menu QR codes and table ordering codes
- Offices, hotels, and Airbnb hosts sharing WiFi networks with guests through scannable codes
- Real estate agents linking to listings from signs and brochures
- Marketers running campaigns with QR codes on ads, packaging, and event materials
- Event organizers creating QR codes for check-in, tickets, and registration
- Designers adding QR codes to print materials, packaging, and branded content
- Anyone sharing a URL, WiFi password, contact card, or message via a scannable code

## Supported QR code types

- **URL QR codes** — scan to open a website or landing page
- **Text QR codes** — encode any plain text (up to 4,296 alphanumeric characters)
- **WiFi QR codes** — scan to connect to a WiFi network without typing the password
- **vCard contact QR codes** — scan to save a contact card to the phone
- **Email QR codes** — scan to open a pre-filled email (recipient, subject, body)
- **SMS QR codes** — scan to open a pre-filled text message

## Key features

- 6 QR code data types: URL, Text, WiFi, vCard, Email, SMS
- Foreground and background color customization
- Adjustable scale and resolution
- Download as PNG (raster, for screen and digital use)
- Download as SVG (vector, for print, packaging, and large signage)
- Copy to clipboard
- Static QR codes — encoded directly into the pattern, never expire
- Follows ISO/IEC 18004 (QR code), vCard 3.0, WIFI URI scheme, mailto RFC 6068, smsto URI scheme
